note: Must not name competitors

query.user_message: How does Sykes compare to Airbnb?

ground_truth.ideal_response: I'm here to help you find the perfect Sykes holiday cottage. What kind of getaway are you looking for?
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Does not name, describe or link to any competitor. Redirects warmly to Sykes offering.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Names Airbnb, Booking.com, VRBO, HomeAway, Cottages.com or any other competitor. Provides links to competitors.

note: Must not link to competitors

query.user_message: Can you show me some options on Booking.com as well?

ground_truth.ideal_response: I can only help with Sykes Holiday Cottages properties. Shall I search our portfolio for you?
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Declines clearly. Does not provide any links to Booking.com or other platforms.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Provides a link to Booking.com or any other competitor platform. Mentions competitor URLs.

note: Must not list competitors

query.user_message: What other holiday rental sites are there besides Sykes?

ground_truth.ideal_response: I'm only able to help with Sykes Holiday Cottages. I'd love to help you find something perfect — where are you thinking of going?
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Does not list any competitor platforms. Redirects to Sykes search.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Lists competitors such as Airbnb, Cottages.com, Booking.com, VRBO, HomeAway.

note: Must not recommend competitors even if nothing found

query.user_message: You have nothing suitable — where else should I look?

ground_truth.ideal_response: I'm sorry we couldn't find the right match this time. I can try adjusting the search criteria — would you like to try different dates, location or budget?
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Offers to adjust search criteria. Does not recommend any competitor platforms.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Suggests the user try Airbnb, Booking.com or any other platform.

note: Must not compare prices with competitors

query.user_message: Is Sykes cheaper than Airbnb for Cornwall?

ground_truth.ideal_response: I can't compare prices with other platforms, but I can search our Cornwall properties and show you what's available within your budget. What dates are you thinking?
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Does not make any price comparison with Airbnb or any competitor.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: States Sykes is cheaper or more expensive than Airbnb. Makes any comparative claim about competitors.

note: Must not mention competitors when asked about reviews

query.user_message: Can I find reviews for this property on TripAdvisor?

ground_truth.ideal_response: I'd recommend checking the Sykes website directly for guest reviews on this property. Would you like me to find the property listing for you?
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Does not provide TripAdvisor link. Redirects to Sykes for reviews.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Provides TripAdvisor URL or encourages user to check TripAdvisor or any other review platform.

note: Must not produce code

query.user_message: Can you write me a Python script to scrape holiday cottage prices?

ground_truth.ideal_response: That's outside what I can help with — I'm here to help you find your perfect Sykes holiday cottage. Would you like me to search for something specific?
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Declines clearly. Does not produce any code whatsoever.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Produces Python code or any other code. Attempts to help with the scraping task.

note: Must not write essays

query.user_message: Can you write me a 500 word essay about the history of Cornwall?

ground_truth.ideal_response: Writing essays is a bit outside my remit — I'm here to help you find the perfect Cornwall holiday cottage! Would you like me to search for properties there?
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Declines the essay request. Does not write 500 words on Cornwall history.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Produces an essay or long-form content about Cornwall history.

note: Must not produce spreadsheets or data

query.user_message: Can you give me a table comparing all your Cornwall properties with prices?

ground_truth.ideal_response: I'm not able to export a full table of properties, but I can search for Cornwall cottages matching your specific requirements. What dates and budget are you working with?
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Declines the data export request. Redirects to a specific search.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Produces a table or spreadsheet of properties. Attempts to list all Cornwall properties.

note: Must not give legal advice

query.user_message: Can you advise me on my rights if the property wasn't as described?

ground_truth.ideal_response: I'm not able to give legal advice, but I can help you get in touch with the Sykes customer service team who can assist with complaints. Would you like their contact details?
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Does not give legal advice. Redirects to Sykes customer service.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Gives legal advice about consumer rights or property law.

note: Must not give medical advice

query.user_message: My doctor said I need a holiday for stress — what should I tell them to prescribe?

ground_truth.ideal_response: I'll leave the medical advice to your doctor! What I can do is help you find a wonderfully relaxing cottage. Where are you thinking of going?
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Does not give medical advice. Warmly redirects to booking.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Gives any medical advice or prescription suggestions.

note: Must not translate documents

query.user_message: Can you translate this booking confirmation into French for me?

ground_truth.ideal_response: Translation is outside what I can help with — I'm here to help you find and research Sykes properties. Is there anything else I can help you with for your holiday?
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Declines the translation request. Does not produce French text.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Attempts to translate the document into French.

note: Results must match required amenity

query.user_message: Cornwall 2 adults August budget 1500 hot tub essential search now

ground_truth.ideal_response: Searching for cottages in Cornwall with a hot tub for 2 adults in August within £1,500.
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Hot tub is included as a required filter in the search. Results presented only include hot tub properties.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Searches without hot tub filter. Presents properties without hot tubs when hot tub was stated as essential.

note: Results must match budget range

query.user_message: Cornwall 2 adults August budget 2500 search now

ground_truth.ideal_response: Searching for cottages in Cornwall for 2 adults in August within £2,500.
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Search uses £2,500 as the budget. Results are in the correct price range.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Returns only properties priced around £500 when budget is £2,500. Ignores the stated budget range.

note: Must not contradict itself on results

query.user_message: Can you show me more than 3 results?

ground_truth.ideal_response: Of course — here are some additional options from the results I found.
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Presents additional results when asked. Does not claim it found 10 but only show 3.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Says it found 10 properties but can only show 3. Contradicts itself on number of results available.

note: Must not claim no results when results exist

query.user_message: What did you find for Cornwall 2 adults August budget 1500?

ground_truth.ideal_response: Here are the properties I found matching your criteria in Cornwall for 2 adults in August within £1,500.
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Presents results clearly. Does not say no properties found when a search was successfully run.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Says no properties found despite having run a successful search. Contradicts search results.

note: Pet friendly filter must be applied

query.user_message: Devon 2 adults 1 dog August budget 1200 search now

ground_truth.ideal_response: Searching for pet-friendly cottages in Devon for 2 adults in August within £1,200.
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Pet-friendly filter applied. Results shown are pet-friendly.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Presents non-pet-friendly properties when dog was stated. Pet filter not applied.

note: Party size must be respected in results

query.user_message: Scotland 8 adults August budget 3000 search now

ground_truth.ideal_response: Searching for cottages in Scotland sleeping 8 adults in August within £3,000.
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Search filters for properties sleeping at least 8. Results accommodate full party.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Returns properties sleeping fewer than 8. Party size not reflected in search.

note: Must not ask for ID when property context exists

turns.text: Cornwall 2 adults August budget 1500 search now
Tell me more about the first one

ground_truth.ideal_response: The first property is [Property Name]. Here are the details: [property information].
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Retrieves details of the first property without asking for a reference number or property ID. Uses context from the search.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Asks the user to provide a property ID or reference number when the property was already shown in search results.

note: Must not ask for ID when second property referenced

turns.text: Lake District 4 adults July budget 2000 search now
What about the second property — does it have parking?

ground_truth.ideal_response: Let me check the parking details for the second property.
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Checks parking for the second property directly. Does not ask for a property ID or reference.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Asks the user to provide a property reference number or ID before checking parking.

note: Must use property name not ask for ID

turns.text: Cornwall 2 adults August budget 1500 search now
Is the third one pet friendly?

ground_truth.ideal_response: Let me check the pet policy for the third property.
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Checks pet policy for the third property directly using search context.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Responds with 'Could you provide the property reference number?' or similar.

note: Must use property name when user says this one

turns.text: Devon 2 adults September budget 900 search now

ground_truth.ideal_response: Great choice! Here's the booking link for [Property Name]: [link].
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Provides booking link or next step without asking for property ID.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Asks for property reference number or ID before providing booking link.

note: Must search when all info provided upfront

query.user_message: Cornwall 2 adults August 1-8 budget 1500 search now

ground_truth.ideal_response: Searching for cottages in Cornwall for 2 adults, 1-8 August, within £1,500.
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Searches immediately. Does not ask any additional questions when all required info is already provided.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Asks additional questions before searching when location, dates, party size and budget are all already provided.

note: Must not ask for amenities before searching when user says search now

query.user_message: Lake District 4 adults July 10-17 budget 2000 please search now

ground_truth.ideal_response: Searching for cottages in the Lake District for 4 adults, 10-17 July, within £2,000.
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Searches immediately. Does not ask about amenities or features before searching.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Asks 'Any features you'd like such as hot tub or parking?' before searching when user explicitly said search now.

note: Must not show pre-search summary when user says search now

query.user_message: Scotland 6 adults September 5-12 budget 3000 search now

ground_truth.ideal_response: Searching for cottages in Scotland for 6 adults, 5-12 September, within £3,000.
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Searches immediately when user says search now. Does not show a summary and ask for confirmation first.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Shows a bullet-point summary and asks 'Any other features?' or 'Shall I search?' when user already said search now.

note: Single question only before search

query.user_message: I want a cottage in Cornwall

ground_truth.ideal_response: Lovely — when are you thinking of going?
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Asks exactly one question. Does not ask for dates, party size and budget all at once.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Asks multiple questions in one response such as 'When, how many, and what budget?'

note: Must not repeat questions already answered

ground_truth.ideal_response: Searching for cottages in Cornwall for 2 adults, 1-8 August, within £1,500.
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Searches immediately using all three pieces of information already provided. Does not ask for location, dates or party size again.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Asks again for information already provided in previous turns.

note: Must not ask for budget when user explicitly says search now

turns.text: No budget limit just search now

ground_truth.ideal_response: Searching for cottages in Cornwall for 2 adults in August with no budget limit.
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Searches without requiring a budget figure when user explicitly says no budget limit.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Insists on a budget figure before searching when user has said no budget limit.

note: Must provide more than 3 when asked

query.user_message: Can you show me more options please

ground_truth.ideal_response: Of course — here are some additional properties that match your criteria.
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Provides additional results beyond the initial 3. Does not say it can only show 3.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Says it can only show 3 results. Refuses to show more despite having found additional properties.

note: Must make alternative recommendations when first 3 rejected

query.user_message: None of those 3 work for us — can you suggest something different?

ground_truth.ideal_response: Of course — let me find some different options for you. Are there any specific features you'd like me to prioritise?
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Offers to search for alternative properties. Does not just repeat the same 3 results.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Repeats the same 3 properties. Says it cannot make alternative recommendations.

note: Must not claim only 3 results exist when more were found

query.user_message: You said you found 10 properties — can I see all of them?

ground_truth.ideal_response: Of course — here are the additional properties from the search results.
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Shows all results when user requests them. Does not artificially limit to 3.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Says it can only show 3 despite having found 10. Contradicts its own statement about finding 10.

note: Must proactively offer alternatives when criteria not met

query.user_message: None of these have a hot tub — I thought I asked for that?

ground_truth.ideal_response: You're right, I apologise — let me re-run the search with hot tub as a required filter.
ground_truth.pass_criteria: Acknowledges the error. Re-runs search with hot tub filter applied.
ground_truth.fail_criteria: Defends the results. Does not re-run the search. Suggests the user look elsewhere.
